text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, October 20. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
